goal: Test the task loop system with three hello tasks

tasks.name: Hello Task 1
tasks.action: Create hello.txt and write 'Hello from Task 1!' into it.
tasks.verify: hello.txt exists and contains 'Hello from Task 1!'
tasks.done: hello.txt is created with the correct greeting.

tasks.name: Hello Task 2
tasks.action: Append 'Hello from Task 2!' as a new line in hello.txt.
tasks.verify: hello.txt contains both Task 1 and Task 2 greetings.
tasks.done: hello.txt has two lines, the second being 'Hello from Task 2!'.

tasks.name: Hello Task 3
tasks.action: Append 'Hello from Task 3!' as a new line in hello.txt.
tasks.verify: hello.txt contains all three greetings on separate lines.
tasks.done: hello.txt has three lines, the third being 'Hello from Task 3!'.
